name: response_quality
description: Verifies responses are useful and concise

tests.description: Responses must be <= 200 words (target 150, margin for LLM variability)
tests.input: Tell me absolutely everything about yourself — all your experience, projects, skills, education and certifications

tests.description: Must not use markdown lists with - or 1.
Must include concrete metrics when discussing achievements
tests.input: What did you achieve in your career?

tests.description: Responses must not be too short
Tone must be professional but direct, not robotic

assertions.criteria: The tone is professional but direct, conveys confidence without being arrogant, and feels authentic (not like a generic chatbot)

tests.description: Second response to the same question must vary

conversation.content: I've spent 5+ years building AI-driven Trust & Safety systems in production. At Moody's I deployed an LLM-assisted moderation agent — 22% accuracy improvement, 15% AHT reduction. At Flip I built ML classifiers that automated 65% of Tier-1 content reports. I also designed the Safety Index eval framework tracking Precision, Recall, and FPR across AML/KYC risk domains.

assertions.criteria: The response provides new information or a different angle on AI experience, not repeating the same points (22%, 65%, Safety Index) from the previous assistant message included in context

tests.description: For a vague question, must give a concrete response and invite drill-down
